chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-1075 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 14-11-2022 Applicants are present on ad-interim pre-arrest bail. Mr. Abdul Haque Qureshi advocate holds brief for Mr.Khadim Hussain Laghari advocate for applicants. Mr. Abdul Rehman Dahri advocate for complainant. Mr. Imran Ali Abbasi A.P.G. Sindh. Applicants are accused of causing injuries to complainant’s father namely Rehmatullah on his head, arm and other parties of body infront of his son complainant Amanullah and Muhammad Aslam on 05.10.2022. The injuries opined by medical officer are falling under sections 337-A (i), 337-F (i) and 337-F (ii) PPC. 2. Counsel for complainant submits that he has no objection to the confirmation of bail as parties have compromised. Learned A.P.G. Sindh also extends no objection in view of such position. 3. Accordingly, this application is allowed on the above ground. Ad-interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicants is hereby confirmed on the same terms and conditions. JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
